---
title: "Bookmarks"
toc: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
---

::: {.panel-tabset .bookmark-card}
## News

```{=html}
<div class="tab-content">
  <h2 class="bookmark-group-title">News</h2>
  <ul class="bookmark-links">
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://www.nytimes.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">The New York Times</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">nytimes.com</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://www.lemonde.fr" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Le Monde</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">lemonde.fr</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://www.folha.uol.com.br" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Folha</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">folha.uol.com.br</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://oglobo.globo.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">O Globo</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">oglobo.globo.com</span></a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

## Technology

```{=html}
<div class="tab-content">
  <h2 class="bookmark-group-title">Technology</h2>
  <ul class="bookmark-links">
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="http://www.makeuseof.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">MakeUseOf</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">makeuseof.com</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://slashdot.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Slashdot</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">slashdot.org</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://gizmodo.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Gizmodo</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">gizmodo.com</span></a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

## Programming Tools

```{=html}
<div class="tab-content">
  <h2 class="bookmark-group-title">Programming Tools</h2>
  <ul class="bookmark-links">
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://en.cppreference.com/w/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">cppreference</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">en.cppreference.com</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://www.modernescpp.com/index.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Modernes C++</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">modernescpp.com</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://carbon.now.sh/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Carbon</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">carbon.now.sh</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://python-graph-gallery.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Python Graph Gallery</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">python-graph-gallery.com</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://godbolt.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Compiler Explorer</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">godbolt.org</span></a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

## Work

```{=html}
<div class="tab-content">
  <h2 class="bookmark-group-title">Work</h2>
  <ul class="bookmark-links">
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://suap.cefet-rj.br/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">SUAP CEFET/RJ</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">suap.cefet-rj.br</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://sippag-web.cefet-rj.br/portarias" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">SIPPAG Web Portarias</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">sippag-web.cefet-rj.br/portarias</span></a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

## Home

```{=html}
<div class="tab-content">
  <h2 class="bookmark-group-title">Home</h2>
  <ul class="bookmark-links">
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="http://dietpi.tailc70dd3.ts.net/homer/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Homer (VPN)</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">dietpi.tailc70dd3.ts.net</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="http://192.168.0.200/homer/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Homer (Local)</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">192.168.0.200</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="http://192.168.0.200:3002/dashboard" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Kuma (Local)</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">192.168.0.200:3002/dashboard</span></a></li>
    <li><a class="bookmark-link" href="https://diegocarvalho.goatcounter.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="bookmark-link__name">Home Page Couter</span><span class="bookmark-link__url">https://diegocarvalho.goatcounter.com/</span></a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

:::
